testSummary: Unit: 67 passed / 0 failed. Integration (REAL Postgres on localhost:5433, non-BYPASSRLS role cdp_app_test verified via pg_roles): 14 passed / 0 failed / 0 skipped across rls-isolation(5), per-workspace-uniqueness(2), workspace-switch-rescope(1), admin-audit(3), service-role-scoping(3). Full turbo suite 27/27 green, exit 0.
notes: Test-first across all 8 implUnits. Pure functions: can/resolveRole/requireCapability + switchActiveWorkspace/buildJwtClaims/isCrossTenantAccess/recordCrossTenantAccess (tenancy); authorize/buildAuthorizerPolicy (authorizer); scopedQuery (db); contextFromAuthorizer/enforceRoute/handleAdminAccess (api). Handlers thin (jose JWKS verify + pg lookups injected). Integration tier proven non-vacuous: cdp_app_test is rolsuper=false rolbypassrls=false; tests SET LOCAL ROLE + inject request.jwt.claims so RLS genuinely enforced; seed via separate superuser conn. Fix during integration run: turbo.json test task needed env:[DATABASE_URL,DATABASE_POOL_URL] (strict env sandbox was dropping it -> vacuous skips). No RLS weakening, no DB mocking, no scope creep (no ingest/segment/email logic).
